sub_responsibility_statement: Record whether delivery could not proceed because the receiving side was not ready or not admissible at the delivery-cycle boundary.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry
governed_object_names: Delivery-Cycle Flag Set;Readiness Signal;Receiving Admission Access
anti_collapse_rule: Readiness/not-ready flag must remain compact state, not a detailed diagnostic report.
notes: Captures registry readiness/admission outcome as a delivery-cycle flag after the delivery attempt boundary.

sub_responsibility_statement: Record successful delivery completion after valid dispatcher-registry handoff.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry
governed_object_names: Delivery-Cycle Flag Set;Log Level Envelope;Lifecycle Transfer State
enablement_family_names: Feedback / Reporting Enablement;Registry Boundary Enablement;Envelope Handling Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Success flag must not imply that Assembler retains lifecycle authority after valid handoff.
notes: Success state confirms delivery completion while preserving lifecycle transfer to the registry.

sub_responsibility_statement: Record delivery failure when handoff was attempted or prepared but did not complete successfully.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Single Queue Moderator;Registry / Delivery Port
governed_object_names: Delivery-Cycle Flag Set;Slot Lifecycle State;Queue Container Identifier
enablement_family_names: Feedback / Reporting Enablement;Queue Runtime Enablement;Registry Boundary Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Failure flag must not be expanded into a detailed failure diagnostic report.
notes: Failure state is compact delivery-cycle state; detailed failure diagnostics belong to RSP-CAN-048.2.

sub_responsibility_statement: Record receiving-side refusal or non-admission without treating the refusal flag as a full diagnostic report.
supporting_entity_names: Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
anti_collapse_rule: Refusal flag must remain separate from refusal diagnostic report.
notes: The flag records that refusal occurred; the diagnostic explanation belongs to Dispatcher Feedback Report rows.

sub_responsibility_statement: Record backpressure or capacity-blocked delivery as a compact delivery-cycle state.
supporting_entity_names: Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
anti_collapse_rule: Backpressure flag must not be conflated with detailed backpressure report.
notes: Captures backpressure state; detailed context belongs to RSP-CAN-048.4.

sub_responsibility_statement: Record that local queue/slot state requires reset or restoration after a failed, refused, or incomplete delivery cycle.
supporting_entity_names: Single Queue Moderator;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager
anti_collapse_rule: Local reset flag must not imply registry-side lifecycle ownership.
notes: Flag indicates local reset need; runtime restoration is handled through Single Queue Moderator and delivery waiting discipline.

sub_responsibility_statement: Record that the affected Queue Container Identifier must be requalified before returning to the correct writing or delivery waiting discipline.
supporting_entity_names: Single Queue Moderator;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Writing / Feeding Round Manager
governed_object_names: Delivery-Cycle Flag Set;Queue Container Identifier;Writing Round Waiting List;Delivery Round Waiting List
enablement_family_names: Feedback / Reporting Enablement;Queue Runtime Enablement;Boundary / Exclusion Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Requalification flag must not store or route envelopes in waiting lists.
notes: Flag points to queue-container ID requalification; waiting lists store identifiers, not envelopes.

sub_responsibility_statement: Produce or expose a detailed report describing the delivery attempt context, boundary, target readiness, and handoff decision outcome.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Registry / Delivery Port;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
governed_object_names: Dispatcher Feedback Report;Log Level Envelope;Dispatcher Boundary Edge
enablement_family_names: Feedback / Reporting Enablement;Registry Boundary Enablement;Envelope Handling Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Delivery Attempt Report must not be treated as a delivery-cycle flag.
notes: This is diagnostic/reporting detail, not compact state.

sub_responsibility_statement: Produce or expose detailed diagnostic context for a failed delivery cycle.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Single Queue Moderator;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
governed_object_names: Dispatcher Feedback Report;Slot Lifecycle State;Queue Container Identifier
anti_collapse_rule: Failure Diagnostic Report must not collapse into Delivery Failure Flag.
notes: Detailed failure context belongs here; compact state belongs to RSP-CAN-025.3.

sub_responsibility_statement: Produce or expose detailed diagnostic context for a receiving-side refusal or non-admission condition.
supporting_entity_names: Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
anti_collapse_rule: Refusal Diagnostic Report must not collapse into Refusal Flag.
notes: The report explains refusal/non-admission; the flag only records that refusal occurred.

sub_responsibility_statement: Produce or expose detailed backpressure context, including readiness/capacity implication when available.
supporting_entity_names: Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
anti_collapse_rule: Backpressure Report must not collapse into Backpressure Flag.
notes: Provides report-level context for capacity/readiness blocking.

sub_responsibility_statement: Produce or expose detailed report context for local reset, slot release, and queue-container requalification after delivery completion or failure.
supporting_entity_names: Single Queue Moderator;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
governed_object_names: Dispatcher Feedback Report;Slot Lifecycle State;Queue Container Identifier;Writing Round Waiting List;Delivery Round Waiting List
enablement_family_names: Feedback / Reporting Enablement;Queue Runtime Enablement;Boundary / Exclusion Enablement
anti_collapse_rule: Post-delivery reset report must not store envelopes in waiting lists or imply occupancy lifecycle ownership.
notes: Provides diagnostic visibility into reset/requalification without changing queue-container ownership semantics.
